subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh with the tongue of the Kingdom! Rejoice in the grace of thy Lord, and be thou glad in what He hath bestowed upon thee, and let thy breast be dilated with light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الناطق بخطاب الملکوت ابشر بفضل مولاک و افرح بما اعطاک و شرح صدرک بنور
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
